# zabbix_trigger (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix trigger.

~> **Note:** Unlike other child resources, `zabbix_trigger` does not carry a `host_id` or `template_id`. Ownership is inferred by Zabbix from the expression itself (e.g. `last(/web01/cpu.util)>90`). Wire Terraform dependency edges via expression interpolation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Basic trigger with expression recovery mode (default)
resource "zabbix_trigger" "high_cpu" {
  description = "High CPU utilization"
  expression  = "last(/web-srv-01/system.cpu.util)>90"
  priority    = "high"
}

# Trigger with recovery expression
resource "zabbix_trigger" "disk_low" {
  description         = "Disk space is low"
  expression          = "last(/web-srv-01/vfs.fs.size[/,pfree])<10"
  priority            = "average"
  recovery_mode       = "recovery_expression"
  recovery_expression = "last(/web-srv-01/vfs.fs.size[/,pfree])>20"
  comments            = "Alert when disk free space drops below 10%, recover when above 20%"
}

# Trigger with no recovery (manual close only)
resource "zabbix_trigger" "service_down" {
  description  = "Service is unavailable"
  expression   = "last(/web-srv-01/net.tcp.service[http,,80])=0"
  priority     = "disaster"
  recovery_mode = "none"
  manual_close  = true
}

# Trigger with tags
resource "zabbix_trigger" "high_load" {
  description = "High load average"
  expression  = "avg(/web-srv-01/system.cpu.load[all,avg1],5m)>4"
  priority    = "warning"

  tags = [
    { name = "team", value = "ops" },
    { name = "environment", value = "production" },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Name of the trigger.
- `expression` (String) Trigger expression. Must reference at least one item using Zabbix expression syntax.
- `priority` (String) Severity of the trigger. One of: `not_classified`, `information`, `warning`, `average`, `high`, `disaster`.

### Optional

- `comments` (String) Additional description/comments for the trigger.
- `manual_close` (Boolean) Whether the problem can be manually closed. Defaults to `false`.
- `recovery_expression` (String) Recovery expression. Required when `recovery_mode = "recovery_expression"`, must be empty otherwise.
- `recovery_mode` (String) Recovery mode. One of: `expression`, `recovery_expression`, `none`. Defaults to `expression`.
- `status` (String) Monitoring status of the trigger. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `enabled`.
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Set of tags to attach to the trigger. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `url` (String) URL associated with the trigger. Zabbix accepts relative paths and macro-based URLs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the trigger.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.

Optional:

- `value` (String) Tag value. Defaults to `""`.
